name: Basil's Garlic Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
Serve with Basil's Crab Cakes, Louisiana-Style.
1. Remove about half-inch of the top from the garlic bulb (the tips of the cloves will be barely visible) and peel off the excess outer skin. Rub the bulb with a little olive oil and honey to prevent drying out. Place the bulb, top side down, on a cookie sheet.
2. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven until soft, about 20 minutes.
3. When cool, remove garlic from the baking sheet and place it in a food processor. Add egg yolks, vinegar, and mustard; process for 3 minutes. Slowly add oil while the machine is running, processing until the mixture thickens, about 3 to 5 minutes.
4. Season with salt and white pepper. Refrigerate until ready to use.
